name: EZPAWN
description_short: White Settlement, TX's EZPAWN at 8240 West Fwy offers quick cash loans and buys/sells items with ID.
description_long:
EZPAWN is located at 8240 West Fwy, suite B in White Settlement, TX, in a standalone building easily accessible from major roads. The pawn shop serves the White Settlement community with convenient hours: Monday through Friday 9AM to 7PM, Saturday 9AM to 6PM, and Sunday noon to 5PM. This location provides a quick stop for residents and businesses in the White Settlement area needing immediate cash or looking for quality secondhand goods.

At this White Settlement EZPAWN location, you can pawn items for short-term loans, sell items for cash, or browse inventory including electronics, jewelry, tools, and more. The knowledgeable staff can assess your items and provide fair market quotes on the spot. Call 682-241-1824 to ask about specific items, get a quote before visiting, or discuss loan terms.

If you're a White Settlement resident needing quick cash or a good deal on secondhand items, bring a valid ID and the items you'd like to pawn or sell. Pawn loans typically get approved the same day, making EZPAWN a practical alternative to payday lenders. Whether you're upgrading electronics or facing an unexpected expense, the White Settlement location offers flexible options.
address: 8240 West Fwy suite B, White Settlement, TX 76108

company_info.headquarters: 8240 West Fwy suite B, White Settlement, TX 76108

pros: EZ+ Rewards Program allows online pawn and layaway management plus points earned on eligible transactions
Instant Quote tool lets customers estimate electronics value online before visiting
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down payment required
'Take Today' buy-now-pay-later financing option through third-party partners, up to 12+ months
Firearms services available at this location—loans, purchases, and secure on-site storage
Pre-owned merchandise priced 25–70% below new retail with daily new arrivals
Jewelry VIP Program includes guaranteed loan amounts, free stone replacement, and free cleaning
cons: Pawn loan fees and APR are not disclosed on the website—must ask in-store for terms
'Take Today' financing partners are unnamed and credit eligibility/interest rates are not stated
Auto loan details are listed as a special category but no terms or amounts are explained
Some services (online payments) are unavailable in certain states, indicating inconsistency across locations
Redemption of pawned firearms requires a background check, adding a step not present for other items
best_for: Consumers needing fast cash against owned valuables with no credit check required
Budget shoppers seeking brand-name electronics, jewelry, or tools at 25–70% below retail
Individuals looking to sell gold, diamonds, or broken jewelry for immediate payment
Firearm owners wanting to pawn or sell guns at a licensed, secure facility
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best suited for consumers who need immediate cash against an owned asset without a credit check, or who want deeply discounted pre-owned merchandise with flexible payment options. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs—fees and effective APR—are not published online, making it impossible to compare against alternatives like title loans or credit union emergency products without an in-store visit.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based, any item in decent working condition)
Gold and diamond jewelry buying (any weight or karat, broken gold accepted)
Firearms loans, purchases, and secure on-site storage
Pre-owned brand-name retail merchandise (electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming, music gear)
Layaway with 10% down and monthly payments
'Take Today' third-party financing (take home now, pay over time)
EZ+ Rewards Program (online account, pawn/layaway management, points)
Instant Quote tool for electronics (online, pre-visit estimate)
Auto loans (available at this Las Vegas location)
Product Protection Plans (computers, audio/video, other merchandise)
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan value, stone replacement, cleaning)
Online shop with daily new arrivals
meta_description: EZPAWN at 8240 West Fwy, White Settlement, TX. Quick cash loans and selling items for cash.
